name: 69th Street Loafers
description: The 69th Street Loafers, also known as the Sons of Italy Gang, were a mostly Italian gang based at 69th and Hermitage on Chicago's South Side. The group included affiliated sets such as the 68th and Wood Street Lil Loafers and 68th and Damen Lil Loafers. Members attended Harper High School and in the early 1960s fought with rival gangs at dances at the In-Motion on 57th and Kedzie.
